title: Weather App V.2
description:
Recently i created a weather app with dark mode background. Today i recreated it with a light mode background. This app is created to check the forecast for your current location or search for a specific city. View hourly and weekly predictions, including temperature, precipitation, and more. Stay ahead of the weather and plan your day with confidence with our easy-to-use app.

Do let me know what you think !

blocks.html:
Overview

Recently i created a weather app with dark mode background. Today i recreated it with a light mode background. This app is created to check the forecast for your current location or search for a specific city. View hourly and weekly predictions, including temperature, precipitation, and more. Stay ahead of the weather and plan your day with confidence with our easy-to-use app.

Do let me know what you think !
